CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-13-2014 CONTINUED TO OCT-01-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR STATUS OF CROSS-COMPLAINT OR FOR TRIAL SETTING. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISCOVERY 302, MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE, TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE AND FOR SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF AND ITS COUNSEL IS GRANTED. WATERFALL WELLNESS SHALL, WITHIN TEN COURT DAYS, SERVE VERIFIED WRITTEN RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTIONS TO DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE--REQUESTS 1 THROUGH 16; AND SHALL PRODUCE ALL RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS TO REQUESTS 1 THROUGH 20 WITHIN THAT TIME PERIOD. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST WATERFALL WELLNESS AND ITS ATTORNEY, PAUL PERDUE, IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,400. SEE CORNS V. MILLER (1986) 181 CAL. APP. 3D 195, 201. JUDGE PRO TEM: TOM COHEN; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 302.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-15-2015 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-01-2014 Set For Trial On Jun-08-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Defendant'S Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, To Compel Compliance And For Sanctions Against Plaintiff And Its Counsel
Off Calendar Nov-03-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling on DEFENDANT GREGORY SCHOEPP Motion To Compel Further Responses To Defendant'S Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, To Compel Compliance And For Sanctions Against Plaintiff And Its Counsel. The Motion is granted. Waterfall Wellness shall, within ten court days, serve verified written responses without objections to Defendant's Request for Production of Documents, Set One--Requests 1 through 16; and shall produce all responsive documents to Requests 1 through 20 within that time period. Sanctions are awarded against Waterfall Wellness and its attorney, Paul Perdue, in the amount of $2,400. Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
